Log_Enabled.description: Enables or disables logging for this playbook execution.

Logging_Append.description: If true, appends to the log file instead of overwriting it.

Log_Directory.description: The directory where the log files will be stored.

Log_Filename.description: The filename of the log file.

Path.description: Absolute path to the main application executable (.exe).

Priority_Class.description: The process priority class for the main application.

Power_Profile.description: The Windows Power Plan/Profile to activate (e.g., Performance).

Arguments.description: Command-line arguments passed to the main application.

WindowStyle.description: The window state of the main application on startup.

Side_Apps.description: List of companion applications to launch alongside the main application.

Path.description: Absolute path to the companion application executable.

Arguments.description: Command-line arguments passed to the companion application.

WindowStyle.description: The window state of the companion application on startup.

OnExit_Args.description: Required when OnExit='RecallWithArgs': The arguments to use when recalling the side application.

Self.description: The process priority class for the launch script itself.

Apps.description: Mapping of target process priority classes to lists of process names.

BelowNormal.description: Processes to move to Below Normal priority.

Normal.description: Processes to reset to Normal priority.

AboveNormal.description: Processes to move to Above Normal priority.

Stop.description: List of Windows background services to stop. Wildcards (e.g., ServiceName_*) are supported.
